title: Burn
why_this_song: Burn by Ellie Goulding (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: 'Cause we got the fire, fire, fire
Yeah, we got the fire, fire, fire
And we gonna let it burn, burn, burn, burn
We gonna let it burn, burn, burn, burn
We can light it up, up, up
So, they can't put it out, out, out
We can light it up, up, up
So, they can't put it out, out, out

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "burn" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "burn" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fire" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause we got the fire, fire, fire
We gonna let it burn, burn, burn, burn
So, they can't put it out, out, out

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Burn" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Burn" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Burn" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Burn"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Ellie Goulding one question about "Burn", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Ellie Goulding sobre "Burn", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
